subcodes.first_line: O my spiritual beloved! I went to Haifa, whilst thou wert present in my luminous heart and visible to mine eyes [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حبیبی الروحانی ذهبت الی حیفا و انت حاضر فی القلب النورانی و مشهود بالبصر
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @personal instructions
